ORDER SUSTAINING IN PART AND OVERRULING IN PART CROSS-DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS-DEFENDANTS VALLEY CENTER EQUITY HOLDINGS, LLC, RAMONA EQUITY HOLDINGS, LLC, WILLIAM GREEN AND MARK FREYMAN'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OF GCL-SOL ORCHARD HOLDINGS, LLC IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS TO CROSS-DEFENDANTS GREEN AND FREYMAN. DECLARATORY RELIEF IS UNAVAILABLE AS TO THEM BECAUSE THEY ARE NOT PARTIES TO THE UNDERLYING AGREEMENTS. SEE CCP 430.10(E); CCP 1061. THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRERS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR #11185

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW W. CLOSE OF O'MELVENY & MEYERS LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 430-6000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT;
ATTY. FRANCIS J. BURKE JR. OF FOLEY & LARDNER LLP, TEL. NO. 984-9870 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS VALLEY CENTER EQUITY HOLDINGS, LLC, RAMONA EQUITY HOLDINGS, LLC, WILLIAM GREEN and MARK FREYMAN's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OF GCL-SOL ORCHARD HOLDINGS, LLC is sustained without leave to amend as to the ninth cause of action for declaratory relief as to cross-defendants Green and Freyman. Declaratory relief is unavailable as to them because they are not parties to the underlying agreements. See CCP 430.10(e); CCP 1061. The court overrules the demurrers to the remaining causes of action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 =(302/JKS)
